posts.author: flip904 (Jacob K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’d like to be able to process ACH payments directly from Monday.com boards.

We have two separate accounts that will be used as the payment method- therefore most of the big ones will not work for this.

I would be open to having two separate QBO accounts integrated, which would allow payments from both accounts.

Option B would be to find a service that two way integrates with Monday to avoid double entry

Thanks

posts.author: deepvyas (Deep Vyas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @flip904 ,
I can help you with integration needed.

Please let me know, if available further to discuss

Regards
Deep

posts.author: SirEric (Eric Maranga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @flip904

We’re proud to be Monday.com partners and development experts, and we’d love to help you implement a solution for processing ACH payments directly from your Monday boards. Your use case is both unique and feasible, and there are a couple of ways we can achieve it:

Option A: Integration with Two QBO Accounts

We can set up a custom integration with two separate QuickBooks Online (QBO) accounts, enabling you to handle payments from both accounts seamlessly. This setup can:

  • Process ACH payments from either account, based on your workflow.
  • Sync data with Monday.com automatically, avoiding duplication.

Option B: Two-Way Integration with a Third-Party Service

If you prefer to explore other options, we can integrate a two-way payment processing service that connects with Monday.com. This ensures:

  • Real-time updates between Monday.com and the payment service.
  • Avoidance of double entry, saving time and reducing errors.

Next Steps:

Let’s schedule a call to discuss your workflow in detail so we can tailor the best solution for your needs. If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to reach out to me via email at mail@creativebits.us or Contact Creative Bits. We’d be happy to help!

posts.author: Youborme (Youborme)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been running ACH payments through antom.com straight from my monday.com boards using their automation—super smooth. It lets me pull payment info right from my items without switching platforms, and I can track everything alongside my workflows. Took a bit of setup at first, but once it’s going, it saves a ton of back-and-forth and manual entry.
